name: German Chocolate Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Partially melt the chocolate over hot water. Remove from heat and stir rapidly until entirely melted.
2. Cool the melted chocolate.
3. Cream together the sugar and butter. Add the eggs, one at a time, along with vanilla extract and buttermilk.
4. Gradually add the sifted flour mixture to the creamed mixture. Stir in the remaining melted chocolate until well blended.
5. Preheat the oven to 300-325 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Pour the batter into a greased and floured bundt pan.
7. Bake for 1 1/2 hours.
8. Remove from the pan and cover tightly until thoroughly cold.
